tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: FAIL: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md missing. Framework only ships docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md (hyphenated). PLATFORM is normalized to mcp_server (underscore) so init.sh:1124 cp-target never matches. verify-install.sh also flags 'Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing'.

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Ran init.sh --non-interactive from $FRAMEWORK; exited rc=1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo.' (PR #18 U-N/U-O fix confirmed).

framework_bugs.summary: init.sh fails to copy mcp_server platform module (filename hyphen/underscore mismatch)
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash init.sh --non-interactive --project x --platform mcp_server --deployment personal --language python --project-dir /tmp/x --allow-existing-dir; ls /tmp/x/docs/platform-modules/
framework_bugs.expected: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md (or mcp-server.md) copied from framework into project
framework_bugs.actual: docs/platform-modules/ is empty. Framework ships docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md but init.sh:1124 looks for ${PLATFORM}.md i.e. mcp_server.md (underscore). The cp falls through to the silent print_info branch. verify-install.sh confirms: 'Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing'. Affects every mcp_server project.

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 exit 0.

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed initialized as [].

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed in order, exit 0 each.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh: 'Phase gates consistent.' rc=0 after all steps complete.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression confirmation: no script auto-advances .current_phase to 2 after phase1 steps complete and gate is consistent. Had to manually edit phase-state.json with jq to proceed. Severity Medium per runbook (still-open prior-sweep bug).

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after phase1 gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all 5 PHASE1_STEPS via --complete-step phase1_architecture:STEP, then run check-phase-gate.sh; .current_phase remains 0 in phase-state.json with no script to advance it.
framework_bugs.expected: A documented script or automated transition that bumps .current_phase from 0->1 (or 1->2) after the phase gate is consistent.
framework_bugs.actual: check-phase-gate.sh only verifies consistency; no advance command exists. Same as 2026-04-25 sweep U-D, still open per runbook.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1' after --start-feature.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written -> documentation_updated) completed sequentially with stub artifacts (tests/test_uat_feat_1.py, src/uat_feat_1.py, docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md). Security audit artifact check passed.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after Build Loop complete.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: shell-direct git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' SUCCEEDED — direct git bypasses PreToolUse. The framework's --check-commit-message gate path correctly returns 1 (verified manually with 'feat(grace-test): post-record' message), but the shell-direct path is unprotected. Same as prior sweep U-C, still open.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After test-gate.sh --record-feature uat-feat-1 + --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, .build_loop is auto-reset to feature=null per process-checklist.sh:463-466 (PR #17 fix). Started new uat-feat-2 loop, all 5 steps complete, --check-commit-message 'feat(uat-feat-2): another feature' returns 0.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote valid sentinel via scripts/pending-approval.sh --offer; piped PreToolUse JSON to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh; got 'permissionDecision: deny' with the sentinel question echoed. Solo-side BL-015 reader (PR #16) works.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent gate invocation no longer cited the sentinel (it now blocked on phase2_init verification, an unrelated downstream check).

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .features_completed in .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1' after test-gate.sh --record-feature.

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 not enforced for shell-direct git commit
framework_bugs.reproduction: After init, advance current_phase to >=2, run: git -c user.email=u@u -c user.name=U commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bypass): no loop'.
framework_bugs.expected: Either a git commit-msg hook or installed pre-commit-msg gate refuses the feat: subject when no Build Loop is active.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds. process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message correctly returns 1, but no git-side hook invokes it; only the Claude PreToolUse path enforces it. Same as prior sweep U-C.

summary: Init/Phase1/Phase2/Phase3/Post-flight all green except: (1) High bug — mcp_server platform module not copied due to filename hyphen vs PLATFORM underscore mismatch (init.sh:1124); (2) U-C and U-D confirmations re-observed (Medium); (3) Phase 4 correctly blocked for private_poc scenario (by design).
